description: Summary row for a session — materialized from SessionProjection.

custom_label.description: User-set custom name. Takes precedence over auto-generated label. Boot replay never overwrites this field.

host.description: Host where the session's events were translated (`gethostname()` or `OPEN_STORY_HOST`). Populated from the first CloudEvent in a batch; survives NATS replication so origin identity is preserved. `None` for pre-migration rows and events that arrived without a host stamp.

user.description: Human user who owns this OpenStory instance (`OPEN_STORY_USER` or `$USER`). Orthogonal to `host`: a single user runs OpenStory on multiple machines. Populated from the first CloudEvent in a batch. `None` for pre-migration rows and events that arrived without a user stamp.

title: SessionRow
